models.label: Neural Net
models.blurb: Feed-forward network with product & campaign embeddings. The task brief's requested non-tree approach -- this is the actual submission.

models.label: XGBoost
models.blurb: Gradient-boosted trees (dmlc/xgboost). The task brief's own standard-approach baseline -- evaluated for an honest comparison, not used for the final submission.

models.label: LightGBM
models.blurb: Gradient-boosted trees with leaf-wise growth (Microsoft). Same role as XGBoost: a standard-approach baseline, not the submission.

models.label: Dynamic Ridge
models.blurb: Linear model with L2 regularization, trained on the stacked panel. Represents a 'structured statistical' baseline.

models.label: Seasonal Naive
models.blurb: Predicts each day using the actual value from exactly 7 days earlier. The sanity-check floor any real model should beat.

models.label: Moving Average
models.blurb: Predicts a flat value: the mean of the last 28 days. An even simpler floor baseline.
